zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada de Workington於1151年出生在英國波藍德沃爾金頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington21歲，母親Grace de Culwen16歲。她於1190年與William Pincerna le Boteler在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1219年在英國藍卡爾貝福 霍爾享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada de Workington于1151年出生在英国波藍德沃爾金頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington21岁，母亲Grace de Culwen16岁。她于1190年与William Pincerna le Boteler在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1219年在英国藍卡爾貝福 霍爾享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Workington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Worcestershire): habitational name from Wormington in Gloucestershire or Berry Wormington in Stanton (also Gloucestershire). Perhaps also from Warmington in Northamptonshire. The placenames derive from an Old English personal name Wyrma + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada de Workington was born in 1151, in Workington, Cumberland, England, her father, Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington, was 21 and her mother, Grace de Culwen, was 16. She married William Pincerna le Boteler in 1190, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1219, in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada de Workington est née en 1151, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Grace de Culwen, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé William Pincerna le Boteler en 1190, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1219, à Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada de Workington 1151 in Workington, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington 21 und ihre Mutter Grace de Culwen 16. Sie hat 1190 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom William Pincerna le Boteler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1219 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England und wurde in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Workington è nata il nel 1151 nel Workington, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Grace de Culwen, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato William Pincerna le Boteler nel 1190, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1219, nel Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada de Workingtonが1151年にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workingtonは21歳，母Grace de Culwenは16歳であった。1190年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでWilliam Pincerna le Botelerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1219年にイギリスランカシュアイアベウセイ ハルで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ada de Workington(이)가 1151년 영국 쿠벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Grace de Culwen(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 William Pincerna le Boteler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1219년 영국 랭카실르 뷰시 홀에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Warrington, Lancashire, England, United: Warrington, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada de Workington nasceu em 1151, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Grace de Culwen, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com William Pincerna le Boteler em 1190, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1219, em Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada de Workington родилась в 1151 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Grace de Culwen, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Pincerna le Boteler в 1190 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1219 г. в местности бюси холл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ada de Workington nació en 1151, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Fitz Gospatric, Lord of Culwen, of Workington, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Grace de Culwen, tenía 16 años. Se casó con William Pincerna le Boteler en 1190, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1219, en Bewsey Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
